name: openagentgraph
description: Event-sourced execution graphs, code maps, handoffs, and coordination surfaces for supervised autonomous software work.

scripts.electron:dev: npm run build --workspace=packages/electron && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=packages/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/frontend" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/electron"
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run build --workspace=packages/electron
scripts.electron:start: npm run electron:build && npm run start --workspace=packages/electron
scripts.vscode:build: npm run build --workspace=packages/frontend && npm run build --workspace=packages/vscode-extension
scripts.vscode:package: npm run vscode:build && npm run package --workspace=packages/vscode-extension
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && npm run start:backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/sdk && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend && npm run build --workspace=packages/frontend
scripts.gate:check: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/gate.js
scripts.handoff:print: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/handoff.js
scripts.handoff:write: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared --silent && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend --silent && node packages/backend/dist/cli/handoff.js --output GRAPH_REPORT.md
